title: TaxServiceTypeValues
description: Tracks taxes that are accrued but postponed for payment or reporting at a later date.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tax Calculation Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tax Calculation Service: A service where the bank calculates the applicable taxes on financial products or transactions based on prevailing tax laws, rates, and customer-specific conditions.

Comment:
Example:
Calculating withholding tax on interest income from a savings account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tax Withholding Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tax Withholding / Deduction Service: A service where the bank deducts taxes at the source from payments to customers or investors, ensuring compliance with legal requirements.

Comment:
Example:
Withholding 30% tax on deposit interest before crediting it to the customers account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tax Reporting Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tax Reporting Service: A service where the bank prepares and submits reports on taxable transactions or income to the tax authorities and, if required, provides statements to customers.

Comment:
Example:
Reporting annual interest income of all customers to the revenue authority.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tax Payment Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tax Remittance / Payment Service: A service where the bank transfers collected or withheld taxes to the appropriate tax authority within the required deadlines.

Comment:
Example:
Monthly remittance of withholding tax deducted from customer accounts to the national tax office.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tax Advisory Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tax Advisory / Compliance Service: A service where the bank provides guidance, statements, or assistance to help customers understand their tax obligations, exemptions, and compliance requirements.

Comment:
Example:
Providing a tax statement for interest and dividends earned in the year, or guidance on tax treaties for foreign investors.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tax Exemption Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tax Exemption/ Relief Service: A service where the bank applies tax exemptions, reduced rates, or treaty benefits on behalf of eligible customers.

Comment: 
Example:
Applying a double taxation treaty benefit for an international client, reducing withholding tax.
